name: ObsidianCoreGateway
description: The single execution gateway for Obsidian note operations. It validates note paths, reads notes, performs atomic writes/appends/exact replacements, and can optionally call an Obsidian CLI command to open a note.
author: VCPstudio

OBSIDIAN_VAULT_DIR.description: Absolute path to the primary Obsidian vault.

OBSIDIAN_ALLOWED_VAULTS.description: Optional semicolon-separated absolute vault roots. The primary vault is always allowed.

OBSIDIAN_CLI_COMMAND.description: Optional CLI executable or command prefix used by OpenNote.

OBSIDIAN_CLI_OPEN_ARGS.description: Optional OpenNote argument template. Use {path} for the absolute note path.

OBSIDIAN_BACKUP_BEFORE_WRITE.description: When true, writes create a .bak file before replacing existing content.

invocationCommands.description:
Read a markdown note inside the configured Obsidian vault.
Parameters:
- command: ReadNote
- notePath: relative vault path or absolute path inside an allowed vault.
Example:
<<<[TOOL_REQUEST]>>>
tool_name:「始」ObsidianCoreGateway「末」
command:「始」ReadNote「末」
notePath:「始」Daily/2026-04-23.md「末」
<<<[END_TOOL_REQUEST]>>>

Atomically write a markdown note inside the configured Obsidian vault. Existing files are replaced through a same-directory temporary file and rename.
Parameters:
- command: WriteNoteAtomic
- notePath: relative vault path or absolute path inside an allowed vault.
- content: full markdown content.
- createIfMissing: optional boolean, default true.
Example:
<<<[TOOL_REQUEST]>>>
tool_name:「始」ObsidianCoreGateway「末」
command:「始」WriteNoteAtomic「末」
notePath:「始」Inbox/example.md「末」
content:「始」# Example\n\nContent.「末」
<<<[END_TOOL_REQUEST]>>>

Append markdown content to a note inside the configured Obsidian vault.
Parameters:
- command: AppendNote
- notePath: relative vault path or absolute path inside an allowed vault.
- content: markdown content to append.

Replace an exact text fragment in an existing markdown note. By default the search text must occur exactly once.
Parameters:
- command: ReplaceInNote
- notePath: relative vault path or absolute path inside an allowed vault.
- searchText: exact text to replace.
- replaceText: replacement text.
- allowMultiple: optional boolean, default false.

Open a note through the configured Obsidian CLI command. This command does not edit note content.
Parameters:
- command: OpenNote
- notePath: relative vault path or absolute path inside an allowed vault.
